title: 10 best herbal creams for menopause
description: Ginger creams helps with menopause because they can alleviate symptoms such as hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings. The anti-inflammatory compounds in ginger, known as gingerols and shogaols, help to reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to these symptoms. Additionally, ginger has a natural warming effect that can help to calm the nervous system and promote relaxation.
